title: Fraud Graph Result (Fraud Graph -> Command Centre)
description: Output emitted by the Fraud Graph ML pipeline (Prayag). Describes detected fraud rings (clusters of colluding accounts) plus per-account risk. The command centre consumes this to render the fraud-ring graph card and feed the fusion LLM.

model.description: Which model produced this, e.g. 'graph_features+xgboost' or 'graphsage'.

rings.description: Detected fraud rings (clusters of connected illicit accounts).

account_ids.description: Member account ids in this ring.

size.description: Number of accounts in the ring.

total_amount.description: Total value flowing through the ring (currency units).

label.description: Optional human tag e.g. 'mule network', 'layering ring'.

district.description: Optional dominant district for the crime map.

accounts.description: Per-account risk scores (nodes). Used for node coloring in the graph view.

ring_id.description: Ring this account belongs to, if any.

features.description: Optional graph features surfaced for explainability.

throughput_ratio.description: min(in,out)/max(in,out) — ~1.0 means money exits as fast as it enters (classic mule).

burst_ratio.description: Share of this account's transactions within 60min of its previous one.

round_amount_ratio.description: Share of transactions with suspiciously round amounts (9,999 / 50,000 style).

edges.description: Optional transaction edges for rendering the graph. Keep small (top-N) for demo performance.
